location.heading: 8 AI Trends To Look Out For in 2025

findings.sentence: 8 AI trends to look out for in 2024 and beyond:

These [different types of AI tools](https://www.synthesia.io/post/ai-tools) are gaining popularity each day, with new applications emerging regularly and [significant investments](https://www.bloomberg.com/tosv2.html?vid=&uuid=2b7d7caa-95ae-11ee-855d-50f31fe0fe15&url=L2NvbXBhbnkvcHJlc3MvZ2VuZXJhdGl2ZS1haS10by1iZWNvbWUtYS0xLTMtdHJpbGxpb24tbWFya2V0LWJ5LTIwMzItcmVzZWFyY2gtZmluZHMv) pouring into the AI space.
It is now evident that it brings substantial business benefits and [enhances employee productivity](https://www.nber.org/papers/w31161).

In fact, there are [initiatives](https://partnershiponai.org/) already advocating for it, and regulatory bodies are working towards enacting laws (with [the EU leading](https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2023/jun/14/eu-moves-closer-to-passing-one-of-worlds-first-laws-governing-ai) the regulatory front).
